title: Basic JavaScript DOM Events
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript DOM Events. Focus on implementing addEventListener correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript DOM Events

title: Advanced JavaScript DOM Events Project
description: Build a small application that applies addEventListener, removeEventListener, Event object properties in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

description: The following code has bugs related to addEventListener. Find and fix them.

description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with addEventListener and removeEventListener.
